title: Inter-School Tournament
content: Event Date: 28th February 2023 Galgotias University sports department conducted Galgotias Sports Fest for students across the India. The information regarding tournament for the event was shared through social media for example Instagram and WhatsApp along with link for registration for the tournament. The number of participants who were interested for the tournament were around . (80). Mentor Name – Mr. Prashant Bharadwaj, Mr. Yusuf Ahmed, Mr. Bhupinder Lingwal Department Name – Galgotias Sports Department
